input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: Existing 2.0.6 tests call obsolete ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructors; generated fixes must use the 2.0.7 signatures, including classifier/downloadUrl/path arguments or Artifact-based constructors.

Tests that invoke real Maven lifecycle execution may touch the host local Maven repository or attempt plugin resolution; prefer self-contained API tests, --help/--version CLI paths, or explicit temporary local-repository handling in test code if exercising builds.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core:2.0.7 resolves its Maven/Plexus/Wagon/Classworlds runtime stack transitively and normal meaningful tests can exercise CLI/help/version and core diagnostic/component APIs without extra dependencies, Docker, or required environment setup; the reported failure is API-signature drift in existing tests.
